name: Angel Hair with Tomatoes, Basil & Garlic
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Angel Hair or Capellini pasta (uncooked)
Salt and freshly ground pepper to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. Heat the oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add garlic and cook for one minute.
4. Add tomatoes, basil, salt, and pepper. Cook for 3 minutes.
5. Add hot pasta to the skillet; toss well.
6. Add chicken broth and stir.
7. Toss with Parmesan cheese and serve immediately.
Pasta Home Page, 30 minute Recipes. Each serving provides: 369 Calories; 12.8 g Protein; 63.5 g Carbohydrates; 7 g Fat; 3.7 mg Cholesterol; 162 mg Sodium.
